title: Wave 26 - Manager queue action completion and resolution loop
description: Coordinate architecture, backend, mobile, and QA delivery for queue action completion flows so manager users can resolve queue items and keep dashboard parity with CRM operations.
acceptance_criteria: Queue actions can be completed through deterministic API contract with role/auth guards
Manager dashboard queue UI reflects completion state changes without hard refresh
Regression suite proves Wave 20-25 manager contracts remain stable after Wave 26 rollout
